rectified_nodes.fix_description: Added data_flow edge from b2 (assignment) to b5 (call) as b5 is a likely consumer of b2's value.
Replaced control_flow edge from b3 (control) to b6 (assignment) with a data_flow edge, indicating b6's value depends on b3's outcome.
Added data_flow edge from b4 (assignment) to b5 (call) as b5 is a likely consumer of b4's value.
Added data_flow edge from b8 (assignment) to b9 (statement) as b9 is a likely consumer of b8's value.
Added data_flow edge from b9 (assignment) to b10 (statement) as b10 is a likely consumer of b9's value.
